spoilers.title: #ONEPIECE1185 Brook is currently 90 years old. This man has fought them all long before any of the Straw Hats were even born. 🔹 The Marines 🔹 The Holy Knights 🔹 Maybe even the Gorosei or Imu He has
spoilers.text: #ONEPIECE1185 Brook is currently 90 years old. This man has fought them all long before any of the Straw Hats were even born. 🔹 The Marines 🔹 The Holy Knights 🔹 Maybe even the Gorosei or Imu He has been fighting battles against these forces long before the Straw Hats took their first breath in this world. Freaking CRAZY 💀
